scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "cross-env NODE_ENV=development vite dev" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:pack: npm run prepare:electron-icons && vite build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.build:desktop: npm run prepare:electron-icons && vite build && electron-builder
scripts.build:win: npm run prepare:electron-icons && vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: npm run prepare:electron-icons && vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run prepare:electron-icons && vite build && electron-builder --linux
